summary: Completed testing of light theme conversion for dashboard pages. Landing page verified successfully with correct light theme implementation. Dashboard theme conversion appears correctly implemented in code but authentication issues prevented full UI testing.

authentication_issues.issue: Supabase authentication preventing dashboard access during testing
authentication_issues.impact: Cannot fully test dashboard UI theme implementation
authentication_issues.details: Signup/login redirects back to auth page, possibly due to email verification requirements

theme_implementation.details: Light theme variables correctly implemented in globals.css
Dashboard .dark-dashboard class converted to light theme
verified_elements: All d-card, d-input, d-btn-primary styles use light theme

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with light theme
CSS light theme variables properly defined in globals.css
Dashboard layout.tsx uses light theme variables and classes
Dashboard sidebar configured with white background and light borders
Dashboard header uses nav-glass light style
All dashboard pages (dashboard, create, funnels, leads, analytics, proof, settings) use light theme classes
No dark theme remnants found in CSS (#111113, #09090B, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) removed)
All dashboard components use var(--ink-900), var(--ink-400), var(--brand-primary) instead of hardcoded colors
action_item_for_main_agent: Authentication flow needs investigation - Supabase signup/login redirects back to auth page preventing dashboard access. Consider implementing demo mode toggle or fixing email verification flow for testing. Theme implementation appears correct in code.
